title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on migration and urban planning.

questions.question: Why are so many people moving from the countryside to big cities?
What can governments do to make rural areas more attractive to young professionals?
Do you think cities will become too crowded to be livable in the future?

script.text: Why are so many people moving from the countryside to big cities?
What can governments do to make rural areas more attractive to young professionals?
Do you think cities will become too crowded to be livable in the future?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
